deploy.preDeployCommand: php -r 'echo "DB=".getenv("DB_CONNECTION")." HOST=".(getenv("DB_HOST") ?: getenv("MYSQLHOST"))." PORT=".(getenv("DB_PORT") ?: getenv("MYSQLPORT"))." NAME=".(getenv("DB_DATABASE") ?: getenv("MYSQLDATABASE")).PHP_EOL;' && php artisan migrate --force && php artisan db:seed --force && php artisan storage:link --force
